params.source:
let size = [
  data["rects"][index].width,
  data["rects"][index].height
] as vec2

let position = [
  data["rects"][index].x - size[0] / 2 + size[0],
  2400 - (data["rects"][index].y - size[1] / 2 + size[1])
] as vec2

const radius = data["rects"][index].radius as float

const scale = [
  size[0] / 100.0,
  size[1] / 100.0,
] as vec2

return { position, scale, size, radius }

let count = data["rects"].length as int

return { count }
